Terms & Conditions

ReelDrop is a Kellough Ventures, Inc. company
Last updated: June 2026

1. Service
ReelDrop is an independent bait and tackle delivery service operating on Florida's Space Coast, owned and operated by Kellough Ventures, Inc. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or agents of any bait shop or retail supplier. We source products independently from multiple local suppliers.

2. Pricing & Service Fee
Prices listed on ReelDrop may differ from in-store retail prices. A service fee is built into all product prices to cover sourcing, operations, fuel, and delivery. A flat $10 delivery fee applies to every order. Prices are subject to change without notice.

3. Inventory & Availability
ReelDrop has no affiliation with or control over any supplier's inventory. We cannot guarantee that any item is in stock at the time of your order. If an item is unavailable, we will contact you to arrange a substitution or issue a partial refund for that item.

4. Prepayment
All orders require prepayment via Zelle, Cash App, or Venmo. Orders are not confirmed until payment is received. By submitting payment you agree to these Terms & Conditions.

5. All Sales Final
All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges once an order is placed and payment is received, except as stated in Section 3 (unavailable items) or Section 8 (cancellation by ReelDrop).

6. Perishable Goods
Bait and perishable items are time-sensitive. ReelDrop's responsibility ends upon delivery. We are not liable for product condition after delivery, including live bait mortality or frozen bait thaw resulting from customer handling or storage.

7. Delivery Zone & Hours
ReelDrop delivers within the Merritt Island, Cocoa, Cocoa Beach, Cape Canaveral, and Port Canaveral area, 6 AM to 6 PM. Delivery times are estimated and not guaranteed. ReelDrop is not responsible for delays caused by traffic, weather, or other factors outside our control.

8. Cancellation & Refunds
ReelDrop reserves the right to cancel any order at our discretion. If we cancel your order, a full refund will be issued. Service may be suspended at any time without notice due to weather, illness, or operational reasons.

9. Customer Responsibilities
Customers are solely responsible for holding a valid Florida fishing license where required. ReelDrop makes no guarantee of fishing results. Customers are responsible for compliance with all applicable FWC regulations.

10. Privacy
ReelDrop collects your name, phone number, and GPS delivery location solely to fulfill your order. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

11. Independent Operation
ReelDrop drivers are independent contractors, not employees of Kellough Ventures, Inc.

12. Limitation of Liability
ReelDrop and Kellough Ventures, Inc. are not liable for any indirect or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to the amount paid for the affected order.

13. Governing Law
These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida. Any disputes shall be resolved in Brevard County, Florida.

14. Changes to Terms
ReelDrop reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the current Terms.

Step 1

📍 Where Are You Fishing?

Drop a pin, paste coordinates, or share your location and we'll bring your order straight to your dock, beach, jetty, ramp, pier, or fishing spot.

Tap above and we'll find your spot.

or paste it
How to copy your pin from Maps

Google Maps: tap & hold your spot → coordinates appear at the bottom → tap → Copy.

Apple Maps: tap & hold to drop a pin → swipe the card up → tap the coordinates → hold to copy.

Live bait needs a bucket!

Live shrimp & shiners have to ride in an aerated bucket with water or they won't make it to your spot. Do you have one with you?
